wire_services.name: Newsfile Corp (TMX Newsfile)
wire_services.why_valuable: Primary Canadian mining press release distributor. TSX/TSXV-listed companies publish drill results here first. Very high frequency of drill result announcements.

wire_services.name: Newswire.ca (Cision Canada)
wire_services.why_valuable: Major Canadian press release distribution. Mining companies publish drill results, assay results, and exploration updates. Structured press release format.

wire_services.name: GlobeNewswire - Mining
wire_services.why_valuable: Global press release distribution with mining tag. Many junior miners publish drill results here. RSS feeds available for automated ingestion.

wire_services.name: ACCESS Newswire (formerly Accesswire)
wire_services.why_valuable: Growing press release service used by many junior mining companies for drill result announcements. Clean HTML format.

wire_services.name: EIN Presswire - Mining Industry Today
wire_services.why_valuable: Aggregates mining press releases from multiple wire services. Single feed covers multiple sources. RSS available.

wire_services.name: Business Wire - Mining
wire_services.why_valuable: Major wire service used by larger mining companies. Less junior miner content but higher quality drill results from mid-cap and major miners.

mining_news_sites.name: Junior Mining Network
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Dedicated drill results topic page. Aggregates press releases from TSX-V and CSE junior miners. Highest concentration of drill result articles of any site.

mining_news_sites.name: MINING.COM
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Self-described #1 source of global mining news. Covers major drill results and exploration discoveries. Mix of editorial and press releases.

mining_news_sites.name: The Northern Miner
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Canada's oldest mining publication (since 1915). In-depth coverage of Canadian exploration projects and drill results. Excellent for Canadian mining focus.

mining_news_sites.name: Kitco Mining News
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Major precious metals news site with dedicated mining section and press releases page. RSS feed available. Strong coverage of gold/silver drill results.

mining_news_sites.name: Mining Weekly
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Covers global mining news with focus on Africa and emerging markets. Regular drill result coverage from international projects.

mining_news_sites.name: CEO.CA - Mining
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Community-driven mining news aggregator. Pulls press releases from multiple sources. Popular with retail mining investors. Real-time stock tracking.

mining_news_sites.name: Investing News Network (INN)
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Covers all commodity sectors with dedicated pages for gold, lithium, battery metals, critical minerals. Regular drill result roundups and top stock lists.

mining_news_sites.name: InvestorNews (InvestorIntel)
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Covers critical minerals, rare earths, and technology metals. Regular columns on exploration results and company updates.

mining_news_sites.name: Resource World Magazine
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Covers mining, oil & gas and resource investing. Written for investors seeking info on publicly traded resource companies. Regular drill result coverage.

mining_news_sites.name: Mining Journal
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Leading global mining publication with in-depth analysis. More focused on major projects and feasibility-stage drill results.

mining_news_sites.name: Canadian Mining Journal
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Canada's first mining publication. Focused on Canadian exploration and development projects. Regular drill result coverage from Canadian properties.

mining_news_sites.name: MiningHub
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Platform for junior mining companies with real-time news and RANKED drill results. Specifically designed for the global investment community.

mining_news_sites.name: Exploration Insights
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Focused exclusively on exploration-stage projects. Tagline: 'Turning Rocks Into Money'. Expert analysis of drill results and discovery potential.

mining_news_sites.name: Mining Digital (formerly Mining Global)
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Global mining industry news covering technology, operations, and exploration updates.

mining_news_sites.name: Global Mining Review
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Covers mining news updates from around the world with regular exploration and drill result articles.

mining_news_sites.name: CIM Magazine
mining_news_sites.why_valuable: Canadian Institute of Mining publication. Technical articles with detailed drill data and geological analysis.

stock_exchange_feeds.name: TMX / TSX News
stock_exchange_feeds.why_valuable: Official TSX/TSXV news feed. ~40% of world's public mining companies listed here. Source of all Canadian exchange mining announcements including drill results.

stock_exchange_feeds.name: SEDAR+ (Canadian Securities Filings)
stock_exchange_feeds.why_valuable: Official Canadian securities filing system. All mining company NI 43-101 reports and material drill results filed here. Most authoritative source.
stock_exchange_feeds.notes: Requires search by company. No browsable mining feed. Best used for verification.

stock_exchange_feeds.name: ASX Announcements (Mining)
stock_exchange_feeds.why_valuable: Australian Securities Exchange announcements. Major source of drill results from Australian and international mining companies. Already in NC crawler.

stock_exchange_feeds.name: CSE (Canadian Securities Exchange) News
stock_exchange_feeds.why_valuable: Smaller Canadian exchange popular with early-stage exploration companies. Frequent drill result announcements from micro-cap miners.

australian_mining_news.name: Small Caps (ASX Mining)
australian_mining_news.why_valuable: Covers ASX small-cap mining stocks with regular drill result coverage. Good for Australian exploration companies.

australian_mining_news.name: Stockhead Resources
australian_mining_news.why_valuable: Daily ASX mining stock news with expert insight. Covers drill results and exploration updates from ASX-listed miners.

australian_mining_news.name: Discovery Alert (ASX)
australian_mining_news.why_valuable: AI-powered ASX mining news alerts. Specializes in breaking drill results, discoveries, and market-moving announcements. Processes hundreds of ASX announcements daily.

australian_mining_news.name: Mining.com.au
australian_mining_news.why_valuable: Australian mining news with dedicated exploration section. Covers ASX, TSX, NYSE mining companies with drill result articles.

australian_mining_news.name: MiningNews.net
australian_mining_news.why_valuable: Leading Australian mining publication with daily breaking news and capital market updates on mines and mining companies.

commodity_specific.name: INN - Battery Metals
commodity_specific.why_valuable: Dedicated battery metals section covering lithium, nickel, cobalt, graphite exploration. Regular drill result coverage for battery metal projects.

commodity_specific.name: INN - Lithium
commodity_specific.why_valuable: Focused lithium news with drill results from lithium exploration projects worldwide.

commodity_specific.name: InvestorNews - Critical Minerals
commodity_specific.why_valuable: Regular critical minerals reports covering rare earths, strategic minerals exploration and drill results.

commodity_specific.name: Crux Investor
commodity_specific.why_valuable: Institutional-grade mining analysis. Covers drill results with financial context. Battery metals and critical minerals focus.

tier_1_highest_drill_result_volume: Junior Mining Network (drill results topic page)

notes.best_for_structured_drill_data: Wire services (Newsfile, Newswire.ca, GlobeNewswire) produce the most consistently structured drill result tables with hole IDs, intercepts, grades, and coordinates because they publish original press releases.
notes.best_aggregator: Junior Mining Network's drill results topic page is the single best aggregator of drill result press releases from TSX-V and CSE companies.
notes.rss_advantage: GlobeNewswire, Kitco, and EIN Presswire offer RSS feeds which simplify automated crawling.
notes.rendering_note: Wire services generally serve static HTML and are easiest to crawl. Mining news editorial sites (MINING.COM, Northern Miner, CEO.CA) typically use JavaScript frameworks requiring dynamic rendering.
